allow: Bash(node -e "const fs = require\(''fs''\); try { const data = JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\(''C:/Users/daiga/OneDrive/Escritorio/PROGRAMACIÓN/IA/repo_git/gastos_BOTijo/Gastos_Clasificación_CLEAN.json'', ''utf8''\)\); console.log\(''Valid JSON''\); console.log\(''Nodes count:'', data.nodes.length\); console.log\(''Connection keys:'', Object.keys\(data.connections\).length\); console.log\(''Node names:'', data.nodes.map\(n => n.name + '' ['' + n.type + '']''\).join\(''\\n''\)\); } catch\(e\) { console.error\(''INVALID JSON:'', e.message\); }")

Bash(node -e "const fs = require\(''fs''\); const text = fs.readFileSync\(''C:/Users/daiga/OneDrive/Escritorio/PROGRAMACIÓN/IA/repo_git/gastos_BOTijo/Gastos_Clasificación_CLEAN.json'', ''utf8''\); try { JSON.parse\(text\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\(''Error at position:'', e.message\); const pos = parseInt\(e.message.match\(/position \(\\d+\)/\)?.[1]\); if\(pos\) { console.log\(''Context:'', JSON.stringify\(text.slice\(Math.max\(0,pos-100\), pos+100\)\)\); } }")
